case_title: 2274-2276-2278 BUSH STREET ASSOCIATION VS. 131 WILMOT STREET LLC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT 131 WILMOT STREET LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF 2274-2276-2278 BUST STREET ASSO.IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSHUA BLACKMAN, SECRETARY. DEFENDANT 131 WILMOT STREET LLC IS PRESENT JOHN SIMONSE,MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT 131 WILMOT STREET LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY 2274-2276-2278 BUSH STREET ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT 131 WILMOT STREET LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 2274-2276-2278 BUSH STREET ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 131 WILMOT STREET LLC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,065.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF: $1000 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
